global_description: A medium-sized seabird with a streamlined body, predominantly black plumage, and striking white wing patches. It has a slender, pointed black bill and bright red legs and feet. The bird's feathers are smooth and glossy, adapted for aquatic environments.
discriminative_attributes: Black plumage with white wing patches

part_details.plumage: Predominantly black with distinctive white patches on the wings, smooth and glossy.
part_details.bill: Slender, pointed, black, suitable for catching fish.

spatial_relations: The white wing patches contrast against the black plumage.
The slender bill is positioned at the front of the head.
The bright red legs extend from the lower body.
